scripts.api:bruno:generate: rm -rf bruno/bridgebox-api && pnpm exec bru import openapi --source openapi/openapi.yaml --output bruno --collection-name bridgebox-api --group-by tags
scripts.e2e:webhook: bash -lc 'API_ENDPOINT=$(aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name dev-bridgebox-ApiStack --profile bridgebox-dev --region us-east-2 --query "Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey==\`ApiEndpoint\`].OutputValue" --output text) && SOCIAL_CRM_TABLE_NAME=$(aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name dev-bridgebox-ApiStack --profile bridgebox-dev --region us-east-2 --query "Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey==\`SocialCRMTableName\`].OutputValue" --output text) && META_APP_SECRET=$(grep "^META_APP_SECRET=" .env | sed "s/^META_APP_SECRET=//") && SEND_MESSAGE_API_KEY=$(grep "^SEND_MESSAGE_API_KEY=" .env | sed "s/^SEND_MESSAGE_API_KEY=//") && AWS_PROFILE=bridgebox-dev AWS_REGION=us-east-2 API_ENDPOINT="$API_ENDPOINT" SOCIAL_CRM_TABLE_NAME="$SOCIAL_CRM_TABLE_NAME" META_APP_SECRET="$META_APP_SECRET" SEND_MESSAGE_API_KEY="$SEND_MESSAGE_API_KEY" node --experimental-strip-types scripts/e2e-webhook.ts'
scripts.e2e:webhook:clean: bash -lc 'SOCIAL_CRM_TABLE_NAME=$(aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name dev-bridgebox-ApiStack --profile bridgebox-dev --region us-east-2 --query "Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey==\`SocialCRMTableName\`].OutputValue" --output text) && AWS_PROFILE=bridgebox-dev AWS_REGION=us-east-2 SOCIAL_CRM_TABLE_NAME="$SOCIAL_CRM_TABLE_NAME" node --experimental-strip-types scripts/e2e-clean.ts'
